sentence: 古罗马的建筑至今仍令人叹服。
pinyin: Gǔ Luómǎ de jiànzhù zhìjīn réng lìng rén tànfú.
english: The architecture of ancient Rome still impresses people today.

sentence: 这片农场大约有五十英亩。
pinyin: Zhè piàn nóngchǎng dàyuē yǒu wǔshí yīngmǔ.
english: This farm is about fifty acres in size.

sentence: 孩子得了热病，需要好好休息。
pinyin: Háizi dé le rèbìng, xūyào hǎohǎo xiūxi.
english: The child has a fever and needs to rest well.
Trust is the cornerstone of friendship.

sentence: 该组织致力于帮助第三世界国家发展。
pinyin: Gāi zǔzhī zhìlì yú bāngzhù dìsān shìjiè guójiā fāzhǎn.
english: The organization is dedicated to helping Third World countries develop.
